issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy paths.
The skill is vendor-locked to Claude Code and does not support other AI agents.

scenarios.name: setup-claude-code-project
scenarios.rationale: Response B covers most rubric items, while Response A is missing entirely.

scenarios.name: refactor-stripe-webhook
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers the extraction of handlers, Zod schemas, and route dispatching, missing only tests and verification, while Response B is incomplete and repetitive, lacking full implementation details.
